title: Cube-ish Buckets
description: Buckets! Do you think the vanilla one is a circle... or some kind of polygon?
body:
# Cube-ish Buckets
This pack tweaks the buckets to be cubes, more fitting with the cube game thing.

Also, you can see the color of axolotls in buckets if you use [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or OptiFIne 

## Preview
![An image with all the buckets in the pack, featuring the Complementary r5.0 Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1LULSldP/images/b29e7fd00b66146256d7540441b394e5e3e1a92a.png)

## Axolotls Preview
![An image with all the axolotl buckets in the pack, which you can see when using CIT Resewn or Optifine. The image features the Complementary r5.0 Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1LULSldP/images/9bd836de0923acc9fced8a8270c01e8152b474f6.png)
